title: poa scaberula
intro: Poa scaberula, also known as rough bluegrass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa scaberula include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting liver function. In herbal preparations, Poa scaberula is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
